title: Potion Lakes
description: Potion Lakes adds naturally-spawning lakes filled with potions across different biomes. Each biome generates its own unique potion lake.
body:
Potion Lakes introduces lakes filled with various potions! These lakes appear naturally across different biomes and offer a unique twist to your adventures. Lakes are filled with dangerous or benificial potions.
Mod will spice up your Minecraft exploration and add a whole new layer of strategy, with the opportunity to discover and use the power of these mysterious potion-filled lakes!
![Speed Potion Lake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ddaf8e1025d83a312a0c12310ab756d86dada76.png)
